differentials.name: hypersensitivity pneumonitis or allergic asthma (no hyphae in sputum
differentials.raw: hypersensitivity pneumonitis or allergic asthma (no hyphae in sputum

context: CHARACTERISTIC highly opaque mucus within dilated bronchi ← calcium salts / metals | tree-in-bud appearance = centrilobular nodules connected to branching linear structures | patchy areas of mosaic attenuation ← concomitant small-airway disease + areas of air | atelectasis, consolidation, air trapping
